title: Semester Registration Notice
content: Students are required to complete semester registration before the specified deadline. Failure to register may result in loss of course enrollment.

title: Mid Semester Examination Schedule Released
content: The mid-semester examination schedule has been published. Students are advised to check their respective department notice boards.

title: Hostel Fee Payment Reminder
content: All hostel residents must clear pending hostel dues before the due date to avoid penalties.

title: Library Timing Extension
content: Library operating hours have been extended during examination preparation period.

title: Hackathon Registration Open
content: Registrations are now open for the annual campus hackathon. Interested students can apply online.

title: Placement Training Session
content: A placement preparation workshop covering aptitude and interview skills will be conducted.

title: ERP Maintenance Window
content: ERP services may be unavailable due to scheduled maintenance.

title: Club Recruitment Drive
content: Various student clubs are inviting applications from interested students.

title: Sports Tournament Registration
content: Registrations for the inter-hostel sports tournament have begun.

title: Scholarship Application Notice
content: Eligible students can submit scholarship applications through the academic office.

title: Attendance Shortage Notification
content: Students with attendance below the required threshold are advised to contact their department.

title: Technical Fest Announcement
content: The annual technical fest will feature competitions, workshops, and guest lectures.

title: Minor Project Evaluation Schedule
content: Minor project evaluations will be conducted department-wise as per schedule.

title: Medical Camp on Campus
content: A free health check-up camp will be organized for students and staff.

title: Workshop on Artificial Intelligence
content: An introductory workshop on AI and Generative AI will be conducted by industry experts.

title: End Semester Examination Notice
content: Students are advised to complete all academic requirements before the commencement of end semester examinations.

title: Make-Up Examination Registration
content: Registration for make-up examinations is open for eligible students.

title: Winter Internship Opportunity
content: Applications are invited for winter internship opportunities across various organizations.

title: Campus WiFi Upgrade
content: Network infrastructure upgrades are being carried out to improve internet performance.

title: Semester Result Declaration
content: Semester examination results will be published through the ERP portal.
